title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration
description: A service encrypts large payloads directly with textbook RSA, verifies PKCS#1 v1.5 signatures by default, and accepts any PEM key without purpose or size validation. Learners cumulatively produce RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Hash exact canonical bytes and use RSA-PSS with explicit hash and salt policy for new RSA signatures.
